V-M-068.purpose: Verify Phase-50 canonical paid tariffs across billing catalog convergence, YooKassa payment creation, subscription activation, device-limit policy, and compact user/admin UI.
V-M-068.checks: Exactly three canonical active tariffs, server-authoritative prices, idempotent clean-deploy upsert, downgrade guard, correct payment metadata, paid subscription activation, device-limit enforcement, user/admin UI rendering, and unchanged deploy/install surfaces.

evidence-priority.level-1: Deterministic assertions first: exact canonical tariff matrix, no duplicate upsert, server-derived payment amount, webhook subscription state, and device-limit boundaries.
evidence-priority.level-2: Trace assertions second: secret-free markers for catalog upsert, checkout validation, downgrade rejection, payment creation, and paid subscription update.
evidence-priority.level-3: Integration checks third: frontend build, frontend-admin build, static smoke, XML/MyGRACE, and protected deploy/install guard.

commands.command: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_billing_tariff_catalog.py tests/test_billing_plan_api.py tests/test_billing_service.py tests/test_device_access_policy.py tests/test_db_migrations.py -v

python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-50.xml docs/modules/M-068.xml docs/verification/V-M-068.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/current-status.xml
git diff --name-only HEAD -- install.sh docker-compose.yml nginx deploy deploy/mtproto-de-compose.yml .env.example produced no output

node scripts/phase74-admin-shell-navigation-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase50-tariff-catalog-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs; protected guard must prove backend billing/user tariff/deploy/runtime surfaces unchanged while admin Tariffs UI is removed.

module-checks.check-1: Canonical catalog defines only krotpn-1, krotpn-6, and krotpn-9 as active paid storefront plans.
module-checks.check-2: Prices are 369, 693, and 936 RUB; duration is 30 days; device limits are 1, 6, and 9.
module-checks.check-3: Startup or migration convergence is idempotent and does not duplicate plan rows across backend restarts.
module-checks.check-4: Payment creation accepts only plan_id from the user and derives all money-sensitive fields server-side.
module-checks.check-5: YooKassa payload amount values are 369.00, 693.00, and 936.00 and metadata contains only non-secret plan/payment identifiers.
module-checks.check-6: Checkout blocks lower device-limit plans when consumed active or blocked device slots exceed the target plan limit.
module-checks.check-7: Paid webhook activation cancels pending trials, preserves paid-subscription non-regression, and exposes the correct effective device limit.
module-checks.check-8: User /subscription renders exactly three compact tariff cards with Russian labels, price, duration, device limit, current usage, and popular marker.
module-checks.check-9: Admin Plans renders a compact canonical tariff matrix and does not expose accidental canonical delete/edit actions.
module-checks.check-10: Phase-50 does not change install.sh, deploy scripts, docker-compose, nginx, TLS material, VPN runtime, or MTProto runtime.
module-checks.check-11: Phase-53 subscription Matrix UI renders exactly three user-facing tariff cards with canonical 369/693/936 RUB prices and 1/6/9 device limits.
module-checks.check-12: Phase-53 visual refactor does not allow frontend-provided price, duration, currency, or device limit to affect checkout.
module-checks.check-13: Phase-54 admin Plans Matrix UI preserves the three canonical tariffs, prices, durations, device limits, active/popular state, and protected non-CRUD controls.
module-checks.check-14: Phase-54 admin Plans layout remains readable at mobile widths without nested card bloat or horizontal document overflow.
module-checks.check-15: Phase-54 does not introduce frontend-admin controls that can override canonical price, duration, currency, device_limit, or payment amount.
module-checks.check-16: Phase-74 removes the admin Tariffs/Plans visible UI only; canonical backend tariffs and user-facing tariff purchase cards remain unchanged.
module-checks.check-17: Phase-74 smoke must fail if backend/app/billing, billing tests, user SubscriptionPanel/Subscription page, checkout shape, canonical slugs, prices, duration, or device limits drift.
module-checks.check-18: Phase-74 direct admin /plans handling must not expose accidental canonical CRUD controls or stale plan cards after the nav removal.

phase-54-admin-plans-ui-gates.gate-1: /plans renders exactly KrotPN 1, KrotPN 6, and KrotPN 9 with 369, 693, and 936 RUB prices and device limits 1, 6, and 9.
phase-54-admin-plans-ui-gates.gate-2: Canonical tariff rows/cards use compact Matrix styling, readable badges, and stable dimensions at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 768x1024, and 1440x900.
phase-54-admin-plans-ui-gates.gate-3: Admin can inspect canonical tariff state but cannot delete/edit canonical plans unless a later backend/admin phase explicitly approves CRUD.
phase-54-admin-plans-ui-gates.gate-4: Smoke fails if stale placeholder CRUD copy, wrong prices, wrong device limits, duplicate canonical plans, or frontend-controlled money fields appear.

phase-74-admin-tariff-removal-gates.gate-1: Admin panel must not show a visible "Тарифы" navigation item or a stale Plans card/route entry point.
phase-74-admin-tariff-removal-gates.gate-2: Admin /plans direct access must be handled safely without breaking build or exposing edit/delete controls.
phase-74-admin-tariff-removal-gates.gate-3: Public billing plans API, canonical catalog, YooKassa checkout, device-limit policy, and user-facing tariff cards must remain identical to Phase-68/73 state.
phase-74-admin-tariff-removal-gates.gate-4: Phase-50 and Phase-68 tariff smokes remain required regression gates whenever Phase-74 touches admin plan UI references.

phase-53-subscription-ui-gates.gate-1: Matrix tariff cards remain compact and readable at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 768x1024, and 1440x900.
phase-53-subscription-ui-gates.gate-2: Current usage, selected plan, popular marker, duration, price, and device limit text do not overlap buttons or adjacent cards.
phase-53-subscription-ui-gates.gate-3: Checkout CTA sends only plan_id through the existing frontend API binding.
phase-53-subscription-ui-gates.gate-4: Phase-53 smoke fails on stale placeholder plan copy, missing canonical tariffs, non-Russian visible tariff labels, or protected deploy/install drift.

phase-50-gates.gate-1: Public GET /api/v1/billing/plans returns exactly krotpn-1, krotpn-6, and krotpn-9 in sort order with price, currency, duration_days, device_limit, slug, active status, and popular marker.
phase-50-gates.gate-2: Admin plan response exposes slug, is_active, is_popular, sort_order, price, currency, duration_days, and device_limit; frontend-admin build fails if the type contract drifts.
phase-50-gates.gate-3: Canonical upsert can run repeatedly on clean or existing databases and leaves exactly one active row per canonical slug with current approved values.
phase-50-gates.gate-4: Checkout accepts plan_id only from the user-facing request and rejects inactive, noncanonical, stale, or lower-limit incompatible plans before YooKassa payment creation.
phase-50-gates.gate-5: YooKassa create-payment request uses server-derived amount strings and metadata; frontend tampering with price, duration, currency, or device_limit cannot affect provider payload.
phase-50-gates.gate-6: Succeeded webhook cancels pending trial, activates or extends paid subscription, preserves paid-subscription non-regression, and exposes the selected device limit to M-021.
phase-50-gates.gate-7: Device policy enforces 1, 6, and 9 active slots and blocks the next over-limit provisioning attempt with a deterministic error.
phase-50-gates.gate-8: Phase-50 static smoke fails if the user/admin UI shows fewer or more than three tariffs, stale plan CRUD placeholder copy, non-Russian labels, or missing protected-surface guard.
phase-50-gates.gate-9: Any diff under install.sh, deploy, docker-compose.yml, nginx, TLS material, VPN runtime topology, or MTProto runtime topology blocks Phase-50 completion.

verification-levels.module-local: Backend tests cover catalog convergence, API payloads, checkout validation, YooKassa amount/metadata, webhook activation, and device-limit enforcement.
verification-levels.wave-level: Frontend and frontend-admin builds plus Phase-50 smoke cover compact tariff presentation and API type compatibility.
verification-levels.phase-level: XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install diff guard cover metadata integrity and operational isolation.
verification-levels.live-optional: Operator clean-deploy validation may confirm the three tariffs render in both panels and a test payment reaches YooKassa with the expected amount.

scenarios.scenario-1: Clean DB startup creates exactly three canonical paid tariffs.
scenarios.scenario-2: Repeated startup updates canonical fields without creating duplicates.
scenarios.scenario-3: KrotPN 6 checkout creates a 693.00 RUB YooKassa payment from backend-derived plan data.
scenarios.scenario-4: Succeeded webhook activates paid subscription and effective device limit 6.
scenarios.scenario-5: A one-device paid plan rejects the second active device.
scenarios.scenario-6: User with six consumed slots cannot start checkout for the one-device tariff.
scenarios.scenario-7: Frontend price tampering cannot alter backend payment amount, duration, currency, or device limit.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Do not log YooKassa secret keys, raw Authorization headers, JWTs, payment provider credentials, email tokens, TLS private keys, VPN config bodies, MTProto secrets, or full user identifiers during Phase-50 verification.
redaction-rules.rule-2: Payment metadata may include plan slug, plan_id, payment_id, user_id, duration_days, and device_limit; no secrets or raw provider credentials may be stored in payment_metadata.

evidence.phase-53-local-2026-06-03: Frontend build and node scripts/phase53-user-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs passed for Matrix tariff UI, canonical slug/price/device-limit preservation, plan_id-only checkout shape, and protected deploy/install isolation.
evidence.phase-54-verification-design-2026-06-03: Phase-54 verification design added admin Plans Matrix UI gates for canonical tariff readability, no canonical CRUD drift, mobile compactness, and no frontend money-field control.
evidence.phase-54-local-2026-06-03: Phase-54 smoke passed for admin Plans Matrix readability, canonical 369/693/936 RUB prices, 1/6/9 device limits, no canonical CRUD controls, no frontend money-field control, and protected deploy/install guard.
evidence.phase-68-local-2026-06-04: Phase-68 frontend smoke and Phase-50 tariff smoke passed after user-visible tariff aliases changed to KrotPN Self, KrotPN Family, and KrotPN Team while canonical slugs, prices, device limits, and plan_id-only checkout remained unchanged.
evidence.phase-72-regression-2026-06-05: Phase-68 dashboard/subscription smoke was aligned to i18n-backed pending-copy rendering after Phase-72 Russian-only Settings cleanup and passed without tariff catalog, checkout, price, device-limit, or admin plan-surface drift.

V-M-068.autonomous-execution-safety: Allowed after Phase-50 verification approval because the scope is limited to billing catalog, payment validation, device-limit policy, UI presentation, tests, docs, and protected-surface guards.

phase-68-verification-design.scope: User-visible tariff presentation verification for dashboard subscription merge.
phase-68-verification-design.gate-1: Frontend tariff cards must display KrotPN Self, KrotPN Family, and KrotPN Team.
phase-68-verification-design.gate-2: Displayed descriptions must be "Персональный тариф", "Тариф для семьи", and "Тариф для команды".
phase-68-verification-design.gate-3: Canonical plan IDs, prices 369/693/936 RUB, 1/6/9 device limits, and backend checkout payload must remain unchanged.
phase-68-verification-design.gate-4: Admin canonical tariff surfaces from Phase-54 must not regress.
phase-68-verification-design.commands: backend billing tariff tests; cd frontend && npm run build; node scripts/phase50-tariff-catalog-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs

phase-73-verification-design.scope: Tariff-aware device-limit copy verification for the user config page.
phase-73-verification-design.gate-1: Device-limit exhausted message may display the active/current tariff name but must not change canonical tariff slugs, prices, duration, device limits, checkout payload, or YooKassa metadata.
phase-73-verification-design.gate-2: Frontend must not trust user-editable price, duration, currency, or device_limit values for enforcement; the Phase-73 tariff name is presentation-only unless backend contract is explicitly extended.
phase-73-verification-design.gate-3: Canonical Phase-50 tariff smoke and Phase-68 tariff alias smoke remain green.
phase-73-verification-design.commands: node scripts/phase50-tariff-catalog-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase73-config-amnezia-qr-smoke.mjs; backend tariff/device-limit tests if API shape changes.

phase-73-evidence.summary: Config page uses existing subscription plan_name only for display and maps KrotPN 1/6/9 to Self/Family/Team aliases; canonical prices, slugs, limits, checkout, YooKassa metadata, and admin tariffs were not changed.

phase-74-verification-design.scope: Protect canonical paid tariffs while removing the visible admin tariff management section.
phase-74-verification-design.gate-1: Admin UI may remove Plans/Tariffs navigation and visible route entry points.
phase-74-verification-design.gate-2: Backend catalog, user tariff UI, checkout payload, YooKassa metadata, migration behavior, and device-limit enforcement are protected no-diff surfaces.
phase-74-verification-design.gate-3: Verification must include Phase-74 admin shell smoke plus Phase-50 and Phase-68 tariff regressions.
